candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Given the two standard reduction equations and their potentials below, write the thermodynamically favored chemical reaction and its standard cell potential.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
鉴于下面的两个标准还原方程及其电位:

$\\text{Ag}^+(\\text{aq}) + \\text{e}^- \\rightarrow \\text{Ag}(\\text{s}) \\quad E^\\circ = +0.80\\ \\text{V}$
$\\text{Mg}^{2+}(\\text{aq}) + 2\\text{e}^- \\rightarrow \\text{Mg}(\\text{s}) \\quad E^\\circ = -2.37\\ \\text{V}$

请写出热力学有利的化学反应及其标准细胞电位。
metadata.explanation_zh:
只有反应(C)和(D)是平衡的。反应(C)是唯一正确计算标准电池电势($E^\circ_\text{cell}$)的反应,通过两个半反应的还原电势之差:

$$E^\circ_\text{cell} = E^\circ_\text{阴极} - E^\circ_\text{阳极} = +0.80 \, \text{V} - (-2.37 \, \text{V}) = +3.17 \, \text{V}$$

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The text clearly asks for the favored overall redox reaction and standard cell potential, and the image is readable enough to recover the two needed reduction half-reactions and their potentials (Ag+/Ag and Mg2+/Mg). The image is necessary, but it is usable, so the sample is understandable and the provided answer is complete.
